last_concepts: Hot take: identity confrontation — you don't have a strategy problem, you have a you problem. The plan was fine; the trader broke it.
Educational: the 3-step execution gap (hesitate → override → revenge) mapped clinically, with algos shown as immune to all three by design not magic.
Avatar persuasion: JT voices the intermedio's bad-day internal monologue (freeze, move the stop, spiral), then contrasts with the emotionless algo that just runs the plan.
